race.comment: GOSSAMER GLOW (8) missed the placings on debut two runs back then didn't feature last start when 7 lengths away in sixth over 1000m at Eagle Farm after being in contention on the corner. This is an easier assignment and has the talent to take care of this field. KATIE AINE (9) resumes here but showed enough in her first campaign to warrant consideration for a race like this. Can run a race while fresh. VOLTESSA (10) is resuming after a 12-week break. Can feature fresh on the home track. FAWUNDERPAR (2) and MISS DECHAMBEAU (4) have both trialled well leading into this and are worth watching for any market confidence.
